_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Employ exfiltration TTPs in cyberspace operations.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI application security risks, including prompt injection, jailbreaking, data exfiltration via LLM outputs, and model supply chain vulnerabilities.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-007 (SP, cosine: 0.387), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.386).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.0/10 (raw 0.198). Shared vocabulary: [exfiltration]. DCWF-only terms [cyberspace, employ, operations, ttps] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, chain, data, injection, jailbreaking] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.875, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.026 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Employ exfiltration TTPs in cyberspace operations." and "Knowledge of AI application security risks, including prompt injection, jailbrea" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.398 > STS 0.198 (gap +0.200). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [exfiltration] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.0%. Shared tokens: [exfiltration]. DCWF-only: [cyberspace, employ, operations, ttps]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, chain, data, injection, jailbreaking].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.200 with low STS 0.198. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
